message:
feat(abi): delegate pthread TLS key ops to host libc when available

Add host symbol resolvers for pthread_key_create, pthread_key_delete,
pthread_getspecific (x86_64), and pthread_setspecific (x86_64). Wire
delegation into the interposed POSIX functions so that when
FORCE_NATIVE_THREADING is not set and the host symbol is available,
TLS key operations pass through to the real glibc implementation
rather than the internal core emulation. This fixes compatibility
with libraries that depend on glibc's TLS key namespace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
